name: Fiesta Pawn
description_short: Fiesta Pawn is a pawn shop in Houston, TX offering collateral-based loans and buying/selling of merchandise. Open weekdays and Saturday with extended hours.
description_long:
Fiesta Pawn operates as a pawn shop located at 5923 S Gessner Rd in Houston, Texas 77036. The business is listed under the pawn-shops category and serves the Houston metropolitan area with in-person transactions. Based on the Yahoo Local listing, Fiesta Pawn maintains a physical storefront accessible to walk-in customers during posted business hours.

As a pawn shop, Fiesta Pawn's primary service model involves collateral-based lending where customers can pledge personal items such as jewelry, electronics, instruments, or other valuables in exchange for immediate cash loans. The company's website URL (firstcash.com) indicates it operates under the First Cash corporate umbrella, a major national pawn shop chain. This suggests access to standardized lending practices and multi-location infrastructure typical of branded pawn operations.

The company distinguishes itself through convenient Houston-area location and extended weekday hours (9 AM - 7 PM Monday through Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM Saturday). The business maintains consistent hours across most days of the week, allowing working individuals flexible access to services. Being part of the First Cash network likely provides operational standardization and consistent policies across locations.

For consumers considering pawn services, Fiesta Pawn offers immediate cash access without credit checks or income verification. However, the website content provided is limited to basic directory information—hours, phone number, and address—without details on loan terms, interest rates, redemption policies, or merchandise categories accepted. Potential customers should contact the store directly for specific lending terms and conditions.
pros: Extended weekday hours (9 AM - 7 PM Monday-Friday) accommodating working schedules
Saturday hours (9 AM - 6 PM) providing weekend accessibility
Located in Houston at 5923 S Gessner Rd, easily accessible in south Houston
Part of First Cash network providing corporate-backed operations and consistency
Immediate cash availability without credit checks or income verification requirements
Telephone contact available at (713) 779-7296 for customer inquiries
cons: No website information provided about interest rates, loan terms, or APR
Closed Sundays, limiting weekend service to Saturday only
Limited details on what merchandise categories are actually accepted
No transparency on redemption policies, fees, or what happens to unpaid loans
Generic directory listing with no company-specific details or policies disclosed
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash with valuables or items to pledge
People without credit history or those unable to qualify for traditional loans
Consumers in south Houston seeking local, in-person pawn services
diagnosis: Fiesta Pawn is best for unbanked or underbanked Houston residents who need quick cash and have items to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawn lending is expensive compared to traditional loans—terms, interest rates, and redemption policies should be verified directly with the store before pledging items, as no rate information is publicly disclosed.
